successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, LeaveRequest, and CreateLeaveRequestDto exactly as specified.
src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts exists and exports AuditAction, AuditRecord, and CreateAuditRecordDto exactly as specified.
src/modules/audit/audit.repository.ts exports AuditRepository and PostgreSqlAuditRepository backed by PostgreSQL using pg Pool and repository-pattern access.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports LeaveRepository and PostgreSqlLeaveRepository with createLeaveRequest, findById, and updateStatus methods returning Promises.
createLeaveRequest(dto) persists a LeaveRequest with status 'PENDING' and writes an AuditRecord with action 'CREATED' through AuditRepository.
Vitest unit tests verify createLeaveRequest stores a PENDING LeaveRequest, creates a corresponding AuditRecord, findById returns the persisted record, and updateStatus behavior is covered.
Project documentation is updated to record LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, AuditAction values, AuditRecord entity, and LeaveRequest-to-AuditRecord audit relationship.

constraints: Repository pattern: all database access must go through repository interfaces.
Audit records: createLeaveRequest must write an AuditRecord when creating a LeaveRequest.
Implement only the specified leave and audit model/repository files and the leave repository unit test file.
Use PostgreSQL-backed repository implementations with pg Pool.
LeaveRequest must be created with status 'PENDING'.
AuditRepository.createAuditRecord must be invoked with action 'CREATED' for LeaveRequest creation.
All async repository methods must return Promises and handle errors without unhandled promise rejections.
Follow the provided type/interface definitions exactly for LeaveRequest, AuditRecord, DTOs, and repository contracts.
No sensitive data may be logged.
Do not introduce API endpoints, services, UI components, or cross-module workflow logic in this phase.
outOfScope: Employee persistence changes beyond referencing employeeId on LeaveRequest.
Leave workflow services (submit, approve, reject business workflows).
Fastify API endpoints, request validation layers, RBAC endpoint enforcement, and integration/e2e tests.
Balance deductions and approval-time business logic.
Any files outside the specified leave/audit model and repository files, unit tests, and required documentation update.
